notes: v0.3.0: Peer-to-peer video (MVP). Enable the new Video toggle on the session screen to share your webcam with your jam partner. The video path runs on a completely isolated UDP socket (local_port+1), its own STUN/hole-punch, and its own threads — audio latency is unchanged. Hardcoded 720p30 H.264 via WebCodecs, hardware-accelerated on most systems. Peers running v0.2.x continue to work audio-only.
